arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Porto in Europa League fixture
arts.sum: Man Utd play FC Porto in the Europa League on Thursday and our writers have shared their preferred starting line-ups.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: D-day for Erik ten Hag as defender makes resilience claim
arts.sum: Manchester United face Porto away in the Europa League tonight and Erik ten Hag could badly do with a convincing performance despite getting the backing of his players

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd coach names the six players who will decide Erik ten Hag's fate as manager
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag faces two crucial matches against Porto and Aston Villa this week to save his job as Manchester United manager - and his former colleague names who he can rely on

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt names key change Erik ten Hag has had to make with Manchester United
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure heading into Thursday night's Europa League game away to FC Porto.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag admits he's 'MAD' over Man United's humiliating Tottenham defeat - but promises to use it as motivation against Porto and Aston Villa
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Embattled Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag said the loss to Tottenham left him 'mad' but does not feel he is under any pressure to keep his job.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag urges Man Utd to take out their anger on Porto after Tottenham loss
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag is hoping his side can get back to winning ways when they face Porto in the Europa League and has urged them to take out their anger on their opponents

arts.ttl: Fresh injury confirmed: Man United boss Erik Ten Hag addresses fitness of Mason Mount, Luke Shaw
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag reveals that Mason Mount also suffered "a knock" during Sunday's Premier League clash against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: A Dutch icon who lost millions in PIG-FARMING, an Arsenal record-breaker and a Man United hero who answered Alex Ferguson's SOS call... Wojciech Szczesny is NOT the first player to UN-retire from football
arts.sum: Former Arsenal and Juventus goalkeeper Szczesny announced on August 27 that he was retiring from football at the age of 34. But he soon changed his mind when Barcelona came calling.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag: Man Utd need to bounce back vs. Porto
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has insisted he retains the faith of Manchester United's leadership, but admitted his players must show a reaction to the defeat to Tottenham when they play FC Porto.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag urges Manchester United to use ‘madness’ as motivation
arts.sum: The 3-0 Old Trafford humbling by Spurs on Sunday increased the pressure on United boss Ten Hag.
